overused_structures: hook → 3 numbered tips → cta to follow
controversial take → explanation → agree with me?
before and after → what changed → product mention
problem → agitate → solution
story time → lesson learned → apply it
myth busting → real answer → follow for more
countdown from 5 to 1 → reveal at end
reaction to trending topic → opinion → like if you agree
day in my life → relatable moments → subscribe
this or that comparison → winner announced → share
product review → pros cons → buy link in bio
step 1 step 2 step 3 → results revealed → cta
question hook → answer delayed → follow to find out
challenge accepted → process montage → final result
morning routine → productivity tips → follow for inspo
hot take → justification → engage in comments
transformation reveal → how i did it → coaching plug
ask me anything → batch answers → comment more questions
mistakes i made → lessons → save this post
trend recreation → personal twist → duet with me
storytime gossip → drama recap → give your opinion
meet my x → intro → follow for more content
overused_cta_phrases: share with someone who needs this
drop a comment if this helped
tag a friend who needs to hear this
let me know in the comments
share this before it gets removed
comment yes if you want more
save this post it will help you later
repost if you found this useful
